name: Dynamiter
flavor: High Noon — lights the fuse and prays. Reskin of the Grenadier; the Dynamite die behaves like the Grenade die.

specialAction.name: Light the Fuse
specialAction.summary: Place a green Move token by the figurine, set the Dynamite die on it, and flick it toward your foes (it must roll). All Hands, friend or foe, within yellow range of the die suffer an attack of the rolled value (3, 5 or 7). On a dud it blows up in your hand: only the Dynamiter is hit for 7. No valid target needed.

effects.text: Dynamite does not require a valid target.
A dud blows up on the Dynamiter for 7.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, choose an additional valid target and apply this Attack's hits to it as well.
